family.title: Family
family.description: We empower families to discover their children's intelligence and choose activities that perfectly match their abilities, ensuring a deep and impactful enrichment experience.

institutions.title: Schools & Institutions
institutions.description: We provide schools with the opportunity to establish strategic partnerships with qualified specialists to support their enrichment options beyond academic curricula.

providers.title: Activity Providers
providers.description: We support activity providers with opportunities for qualification, keeping up with quality standards and market requirements to achieve a positive and tangible impact on children's lives.

evaluations.title: Reliable scientific assessments
evaluations.description: A set of accurate, easy assessments to help you evaluate each child's abilities.

activities.title: Individual enrichment activity paths
activities.description: A set of accurate, easy assessments to help you evaluate each child's abilities.

reports.title: Instant reports

dashboards.title: Multiple easy dashboards

HowItWorks.title: How does Ithraa work?
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple journey that helps you discover and nurture a child's strengths.

evaluate.title: Run intelligence assessments
evaluate.description: A set of structured tests to identify strengths and core skills.

map.title: Get a full intelligence map
map.description: Understand the child's abilities clearly and build the right learning plan.

recommend.title: Smart activities & paths
recommend.description: Recommendations that match the child's level and support steady growth.

track.title: Track progress and development
track.description: Follow improvement over time and adjust the path as needed.

t1.name: Sarah Abdulaziz
t1.quote: A smooth experience and very clear results. It helped me understand my child better.

t2.name: Yasser Mostafa
t2.quote: The reports are practical and the learning paths are thoughtfully designed.

t3.name: Noura AlHarbi
t3.quote: Great dashboards and follow-up tools. Implementation was straightforward.

t4.name: Ahmed Ali
t4.quote: The platform is organized and the recommendations are genuinely helpful.

t5.name: Reem Hassan
t5.quote: Beautiful UI and a clear process—from assessment to progress tracking.

About.title: Your first choice for discovering and developing every child's potential
About.description: Our smart platform connects parents and schools with activity and educational service providers, offering customized extracurricular and recreational paths designed based on children's multiple intelligences and interests. We ensure high-quality connections to support children's growth and skill development, building their future with confidence and excellence.

vision.title: We believe every child carries a unique world within them
vision.p1: At Ithraa Intelligence, we believe talents deserve to be discovered and nurtured. That's why we built an integrated smart platform to be the first choice for schools and families, connecting them with activity and educational service providers to build customized enrichment paths.
vision.p2: Our platform offers extracurricular and recreational paths precisely designed based on multiple intelligences and each child's individual interests. We use the latest technologies to empower families to choose programs and experiences that perfectly match their children's interests, ensuring a deep and impactful educational and recreational experience.
vision.callout: Together, we create a future where every child discovers their uniqueness and turns their potential into real success.

system.title: High-Quality Connection Ecosystem
system.description: We provide a high-quality connection system that ensures the best experiences to develop children's talents and guide them toward their true passion through three pillars:

pillars.title: Empowering Families
pillars.desc: Make informed decisions based on real assessments and discover children's intelligences and individual tendencies.

pillars.title: Strategic School Partnerships
pillars.desc: Support educational institutions with distinguished enrichment options beyond traditional academic curricula.

pillars.title: Service Provider Qualification
pillars.desc: Help activity providers meet quality standards and market requirements to achieve tangible impact.

About.footer: Ithraa Intelligence is not just a digital platform; it's an integrated community that combines education and development, contributing to building a confident, creative generation capable of reaching its full potential.

Privacy.headerDesc: At Ithraa Intelligence, we are committed to the highest transparent security standards to protect your and your children's data in accordance with the regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

definitions.title: 1. Definitions and Terminology

items.label: Platform
items.desc: Ithraa Intelligence website and application in all its electronic forms providing educational enrichment services and recommendations.

items.label: User
items.desc: Any person accessing the platform, including parents, schools, and activity providers.

items.label: Parent/Guardian
items.desc: The adult who registers on the platform on behalf of their child to discover enrichment activities.

items.label: Provider
items.desc: The school, educational institution, or activity provider who lists their programs on the platform.

items.label: Child
items.desc: Any individual under eighteen years of age whose data is shared by their parent or guardian.

items.label: Personal Data
items.desc: Any information that identifies you directly or indirectly, such as name, email, and device identifier.

definitions.lawNote: Applicable Law: The Personal Data Protection Law in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (Royal Decree M/19) issued under the supervision of the Saudi Authority for Data and Artificial Intelligence (SDAIA).

about.title: 2. Who We Are
about.description: We are Ithraa Intelligence, a company registered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, operating an intelligent educational platform that helps families discover suitable programs for their children. When you use the platform, we are the data controller responsible for your personal data.

items.title: Parents and Families
items.desc: Adults seeking to discover activities. Child data is only provided with the parent's explicit consent.

items.title: Schools and Institutions
items.desc: Schools that register to list their programs and manage recommendations and reports for enrolled students.

items.title: Activity Providers
items.desc: Institutions and individuals developing enrichment programs who wish to reach their target audience.

parents.title: A. Parents and Children
items: Full name, email address, and mobile number.
Account details (username and automatically encrypted password).
Child profile: first name, age, interests, special needs, and educational choices.
Saved programs, search history, and platform preferences.

providers.title: B. Schools and Activity Providers
items: Authorized representative name, job title, email, and phone number.
Institution name, commercial registration number, address, and approved logo.
Listed program details (age groups, schedules, and locations).

technical.title: C. Technical Data (For All):
technical.desc: IP address, device type and operating system, along with anonymized analytics data via Google Analytics to understand browsing behavior and improve performance.

howItems.text: When you enter data and create an account.
Cookies and technical files for session security only.

rights.title: 10. Your Rights Under the Personal Data Protection Law
rights.description: Saudi law (Article 4) guarantees you absolute and direct fundamental rights to control your data, including:

items.title: Right to be Informed
items.desc: Know what data we hold and how it is used (as outlined in this policy).

items.title: Right to Access
items.desc: Request a complete copy of the digital data we hold about you or your child.

items.title: Right to Rectification
items.desc: Correct or update any incorrect, outdated, or incomplete data within the platform immediately.

items.title: Right to Erasure (Deletion)
items.desc: Request deletion of your data when the legal or contractual purpose ends.

rights.contact: To exercise your rights or submit a request, contact our compliance team at: {email}

complaints.title: 13. Complaints, Grievances, and Contact
complaints.description: If you have any concerns or inquiries regarding your privacy, please contact us directly to resolve them as quickly as possible with full transparency.

complaintsEmail.label: Complaints Email
complaintsEmail.responseTime: Expected response time: within 10 working days
